summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fleet OS Duty Slip System + Contract-Based Billing Engine. All 31 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new features working correctly. Fixed a critical bug where duty slip status was incorrectly set to 'BILLED' (invalid enum value) when creating invoices.

fixed.issue: Duty slip status was being set to 'BILLED' which is not a valid DutySlipStatus enum value (only DRAFT, SIGNED, DISPUTED are valid). This caused GET /api/duty-slips to return 500 error.
fixed.fix: Changed invoice creation to mark associated trips as BILLED instead of duty slips. Duty slips remain SIGNED after billing.

passed_tests: Contract CRUD - POST /api/contracts (HYBRID type - Base + Usage)
Duty Slip - Duplicate creation error handling
Duty Slip - PATCH /api/duty-slips/{id}/sign (with signature - locks slip)
Duty Slip - Cannot modify signed slip validation
Admin UI - Contracts page with all contract types displayed
Admin UI - Create Contract modal with type-specific fields
Admin UI - Trip Management page with trip lifecycle
Admin UI - Create Trip modal with all fields
Admin UI - Duty Slips page with filters
Corporate UI - Duty Slips page with monthly summary and contract info
critical_code_review_comments: Dialog components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - low priority
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed duty slip status bug in invoice creation)
seed_data_creation: Created test contracts (FIXED_MONTHLY, PER_KM, PER_DAY, PACKAGE, HYBRID), trips, duty slips with signatures, and invoices during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Duty Slip System + Contract-Based Billing Engine features are fully functional. Key architecture: One Booking → Multiple Trips (for recurring), One Trip → One Duty Slip (STRICT 1:1), Multiple Duty Slips → One Invoice. Contract types (FIXED_MONTHLY, PER_KM, PER_DAY, PACKAGE, ROUTE_BASED, HYBRID) all working. Duty slip lifecycle (DRAFT → SIGNED) with signature pad working. Invoice generation from duty slips calculates amounts based on contract type. Corporate portal shows duty slips, monthly summary, and active contract. Fixed bug where duty slip status was incorrectly set to BILLED - now only trips get BILLED status.

contract_management.crud_operations: Working - Create, Read, Update for all contract types
contract_management.pricing_fields: Type-specific pricing fields (monthly_amount, rate_per_km, daily_rate, package_hours/km/rate, etc.)

trip_management.create_trip: Working - Create trip with client, contract, pickup/dropoff, passenger info
trip_management.assign_trip: Working - Assign vehicle and driver, status changes to ASSIGNED
trip_management.status_flow: CREATED → ASSIGNED → ACCEPTED → STARTED (via duty slip) → COMPLETED (via signature) → BILLED → CLOSED

duty_slip_system.create_slip: Working - Creates from trip with opening_km, auto-populates driver/vehicle/client info
duty_slip_system.sign_slip: Working - Signature pad captures base64 image, locks slip (status=SIGNED)
duty_slip_system.1_to_1_relationship: Enforced - One trip can only have one duty slip

invoice_generation.contract_pricing: Working - Calculates based on contract type (fixed, per_km, per_day, package, hybrid)
invoice_generation.extra_charges: Working - Toll, Parking, GST can be added

corporate_portal.duty_slips_view: Working - Shows duty slips for corporate client
corporate_portal.monthly_summary: Working - Shows trips, signed slips, total KM, total payable
